product.name: BlueStars 4 Packs Pool Cleaner Zippered Bag, Nylon Mesh Pool Vacuum Bag Replacement - Compatible with Polaris 280, 480 Pool Cleaners - All Purpose Bag K13 K16
product.description: Package includes  4x Pool Cleaner All Purpose Bag K13 with Zipper  UPGRADED WITH ZIPPER  If you notice significant wear and tear, holes, or damage to your Cleaner All Purpose Bag, it is advisable to replace them. The upgraded design features a sturdy zipper, allowing for secure containment of debris and effortless emptying after cleaning sessions  COLLECT DEBRIS AND DIRT FROM THE POOL  BlueStars Cleaner Bags K13 and K16 for Polaris 280, 480 Pool Cleaner are designed to hold a range of debris sizes and types: leaves, sand, and others. This filtration system helps prevent the accumulation of larger debris in the pool cleaner's internal components, which can lead to decreased performance or potential damage.  IDEAL REPLACEMENT PART  BlueStars Cleaner Bags K13 and K16 are made exactly fit for Polaris Pool Cleaner models 280 and 480
features: ✅ Package includes: 4x Pool Cleaner All Purpose Bag K13 with Zipper

✅ Upgraded With Zipper: If you notice significant wear and tear, holes, or damage to your Cleaner All Purpose Bag, it is advisable to replace them. The upgraded design features a sturdy zipper, allowing for secure containment of debris and effortless emptying after cleaning sessions

✅ Collect Debris And Dirt From The Pool: BlueStars Cleaner Bags K13 and K16 for Polaris 280, 480 Pool Cleaner are designed to hold a range of debris sizes and types: leaves, sand, and others. This filtration system helps prevent the accumulation of larger debris in the pool cleaner's internal components, which can lead to decreased performance or potential damage.
✅ Ideal Replacement Part: BlueStars Cleaner Bags K13 and K16 are made exactly fit for Polaris Pool Cleaner models 280 and 480.

✅ BlueStars Cleaner Bags K13 and K16 can be easily removed from the pool cleaner for emptying and cleaning. After removing the bag, debris can be emptied and the bag can be rinsed with water to remove any remaining dirt or particles. Regular maintenance of the bag ensures its longevity and continued filtration efficiency.
